adminUpdates.title: Updates

selfUpdate.title: Self-update
selfUpdate.readyDescription: Send a signed request to the external updater. The app may restart while the updater pulls the Docker image and recreates the web service.
selfUpdate.manualFallbackDescription: Automatic update is not active for this install. Use the manual Docker commands below, or configure an external updater when you are ready.
selfUpdate.acknowledge: I have reviewed the release notes, backed up Postgres and uploads, and understand the app may restart.
selfUpdate.startedDescription: The external updater accepted the request. The app may restart while it installs the Docker image.

blocked.disabled: Self-update is disabled. Set TASKNEBULA_SELF_UPDATE_ENABLED=true and configure the updater webhook to enable it.
blocked.missing_webhook: Self-update is enabled, but TASKNEBULA_SELF_UPDATE_WEBHOOK_URL is missing or invalid.
blocked.missing_secret: Self-update is enabled, but TASKNEBULA_SELF_UPDATE_WEBHOOK_SECRET is missing.
blocked.checks_disabled: Update checks are disabled, so the app cannot safely choose a target Docker image.
blocked.no_update: No newer Docker image is available.
blocked.missing_docker_image: Docker Hub did not return a semver image tag to install.
blocked.invalid_target: The selected target version is not valid for this install.
blocked.active_job: Another update request is already active. Wait for it to finish before starting a new one.

orgComms.toggle_enabled_desc: Allow project channels and contextual discussions across the workspace.

Use this to pin a model with specific temperature / token / reasoning-effort settings, or to try a model that is not in the built-in catalog.

projectConfig.wf_no_transition_hint: Click an empty cell to create one, or an existing one to edit.
projectConfig.rule_define_help: Define who can perform this transition and whether it requires approval.
projectConfig.requires_approval_hint: Item enters a pending state until an approver accepts or rejects it.

agentOps.controlUpdatedDescription: Global agent safety and runtime controls were saved.

guardrails.title: Global guardrails
guardrails.description: One place to pause every agent or force the system into supervised mode.
guardrails.globalEnablementDetail: Turn off all workspace and project agent runs from one switch.
guardrails.allowWriteActionsDetail: Force every sprint creation and backlog edit into preview if disabled.
guardrails.requireSupervisionDetail: Even autonomous projects stay preview-first when this is enabled.

serviceStatus.title: Service status
serviceStatus.description: Runtime gates for the agent control plane.

providerCoverage.title: Provider coverage
providerCoverage.description: Workspace provider selection and runnable coverage.

workspaceCoverage.title: Workspace coverage
workspaceCoverage.description: Per-workspace readiness, credential source, and recent failure visibility.
workspaceCoverage.noData: No workspace AI coverage data yet.

manage.title: Where to manage what
manage.description: Clear separation between global controls, workspace credentials, and project behavior.
manage.adminControlDetail: Global pause, write guardrails, auto-mode supervision, concurrency, live feed.
manage.workspaceAiDetail: Provider choice, saved model registry, API key storage, workspace write policy.
manage.projectAiDetail: Project enablement, sprint capacity, live run buttons, project-level telemetry.

liveFeed.title: Live execution feed
liveFeed.description: Real-time status and logs from every agent run happening right now.
liveFeed.noActiveRuns: No agent runs are active right now.

recentRuns.title: Recent agent runs
recentRuns.description: System-wide history for monitoring rollout quality and blast radius.
recentRuns.noData: No agent runs have been recorded yet.

integrations.title: Integration OAuth credentials
integrations.description: Configure platform-wide client id / client secret for each integration provider. Values are encrypted (AES-256-GCM) at rest. Environment variables (e.g. SLACK_CLIENT_ID) still work as a fallback when a provider has no database entry.
integrations.credentialsSavedDescription: {provider} OAuth is now configured from the admin store.
integrations.configureDescription: Paste the OAuth client id and secret from your {provider} app. Secrets are encrypted before leaving the server.
integrations.replaceRowHint: Replacing the row requires re-entering the secret.

providerDescription.slack: OAuth app credentials for connecting Slack workspaces to TaskNebula.
providerDescription.gitlab: OAuth application for mirroring merge requests and pipelines.
providerDescription.jira: Atlassian 3LO app for syncing issues and projects.
providerDescription.github: GitHub OAuth app for sign-in and repo / issue / pull request sync.
providerDescription.google: Google OAuth client for sign-in and workspace integrations.
providerDescription.sentry: OAuth app for syncing Sentry issues with TaskNebula work items.

platformAi.title: Platform provider keys
platformAi.description: Optional defaults every workspace falls back to when it has not entered its own key. Stored encrypted (AES-256-GCM) in the DB — never shown in plaintext after save.
platformAi.keySavedDescription: {provider} default key is now available to all workspaces.

hint.openai: Used when a workspace has not entered its own OpenAI key. Starts with sk-…
hint.anthropic: Used when a workspace has not entered its own Anthropic key. Starts with sk-ant-…

platformAi.saveFailedDescription: Could not save the credential. Please try again.
platformAi.removeFailedDescription: Could not remove the credential. Please try again.

realtimeHealth.redisReadyDetail: SSE events and presence fan out through Redis pub/sub.
realtimeHealth.redisFallbackDetail: Redis missing. Using single-instance in-memory fallback.

systemCredentials.intro: Platform-wide credentials that override environment variables. Secrets are encrypted (AES-256-GCM) before being written to the system_settings table and are only shown as ••••last4 previews after save.

smtp.title: SMTP
smtp.description: Used for invite, notification, and verification emails.
smtp.sendTestTitle: Send a test email to yourself

livekit.title: LiveKit
livekit.description: Realtime audio/video rooms for in-app calls.

storage.title: Storage
storage.description: Local uploads directory or an S3-compatible bucket for attachments.

registration.title: Registration
registration.description: Choose who can create new accounts on this installation.
registration.savedDescription: New account creation now follows the selected policy.
registration.allowRegistrationDescription: Anyone can create an account from the public signup page.
registration.inviteOnlyDescription: Only users with a valid invitation token can complete signup.
registration.adminCreatedOnlyDescription: Public signup is disabled; super admins create accounts from the Users tab.

emailPreview.title: Email preview
emailPreview.description: Render any TaskNebula transactional email with sample variables. Diagnostic only — no emails are sent from this view.
emailPreview.sendSmtpTestTitle: Send the generic SMTP test email to your admin address (not the previewed template — the /smtp/test endpoint only supports a fixed test message).
emailPreview.previewingDetail: {label}. The iframe below renders the exact HTML the recipient would see (sandboxed; external links disabled).

flagTest.title: Runtime flag evaluation
flagTest.description: Evaluates the flag through the same codepath production uses — no restart needed.

editFlag.title: Edit feature flag
editFlag.description: Update flag settings to control feature rollout.

flagForm.name: Name
flagForm.plansHint: Leave empty to enable for all plans.
flagForm.targetOrganizationsHint: Leave empty to enable for all organizations matching the plan + rollout.

createOrg.description: Create a new organization and assign an owner.
createOrg.missingFieldsDescription: Name, slug, and owner are required.

editOrg.title: Edit organization
editOrg.description: Update organization details, plan, and status.

createUser.description: Create a new user account. They can be added to organizations later.
createUser.missingFieldsDescription: Name, email, and password are required.

editUser.superAdminWarning: This user will have full access to all organizations and system settings.

charts.velocityDescription: Completed issues and story points across recent sprints.
charts.doraDerivedDescription: Deploy frequency, lead time, change failure rate, rework rate, and recovery time are derived from GitHub deployments and linked issues.
charts.insightPrompt: <label>AI insight</label> — click to explain what changed in this chart.

badge.disclosure: EU AI Act Article 50 disclosure. See <link>model cards</link>.

disclosure.title: You are about to interact with AI
disclosure.description: Some TaskNebula features use third-party AI models to generate text, suggestions, and summaries. Before you continue, please read what that means for you.
disclosure.rightLabelled: Every AI output is labelled <label>Generated with AI</label>.
disclosure.rightReview: You can review and reject any AI suggestion before it is applied.
disclosure.rightDisable: Workspace admins can disable any AI feature in Settings → AI Transparency.
disclosure.rightRetention: Inputs/outputs are retained per the model card retention policy and never sold.
disclosure.modelCardsLine: Read the <link>full model cards</link> for each feature, including model identity, data sent, and retention.
disclosure.versionLine: Disclosure version {version}. Required by EU AI Act Article 50.

draft.title: Draft issues with AI
draft.description: Describe what you need. AI splits it into editable drafts — preview on the right, confirm to create.
draft.emptyHint: One prompt can describe a single bug OR a whole checklist — AI splits on its own.
draft.noDrafts: No drafts produced — try refining the prompt.
draft.draftedCount: Drafted {count, plural, one {# issue} other {# issues}} from your prompt.
draft.createdCount: {count, plural, one {# issue created} other {# issues created}}
draft.thinkingTrace: Reading prompt, classifying scope (single ticket vs checklist), then drafting titles, types, priorities, and labels for each item.
draft.promptPlaceholder:
Examples:
• Navbar dropdown flickers on Safari below 640px.
• Ship the mobile app: add offline mode, fix push delivery, refresh onboarding copy.
draft.itemsReady: {count, plural, one {# item ready to create. Confirm to continue.} other {# items ready to create. Confirm to continue.}}
draft.queuedForApprovalCount: {count, plural, one {1 draft is waiting for approval} other {# drafts are waiting for approval}}

sidecar.name: Sidecar
sidecar.noTrace: No reasoning trace recorded for this response.
sidecar.emptyWithEntity: Ask anything about {entity}, or switch to Build mode to create work.
sidecar.emptyNoEntity: Open me from any work item, project, or page and I will pick up the context automatically.
sidecar.buildStubDescription: Entity creation from Sidecar is not wired yet. This prompt has been captured.
sidecar.stubAnswer: (stub) I would answer "{prompt}" using {entity} as context.
sidecar.stubBuild: (stub) I would build something based on "{prompt}" scoped to {entity}.
sidecar.stubThinkingAsk:
1. Load context for {entity}.
2. Retrieve relevant chunks.
3. Draft grounded answer.
sidecar.stubThinkingBuild:
1. Parse intent from "{prompt}".
2. Map to entity schema under {entity}.
3. Stage a creation plan for the user to confirm.

roadmap.title: Initiatives

analytics.subtitle: Insights and metrics for your project

team.title: Team
team.metaDescription: Manage your team members and settings
team.noOrganization: You are not a member of any organization yet.

members.emptyDescription: Invite team members to collaborate on projects.

templates.title: Templates
templates.description: Reusable starting points for work items, projects, and pages.

apiDocs.title: API Reference
apiDocs.description: OpenAPI 3.1 documentation for the TaskNebula HTTP API. Spec source: <link>/openapi.json</link>

aiDisabled.title: AI features are paused platform-wide
aiDisabled.body: A super-admin has to flip the master toggle in Admin → Agent control → Global enablement to expose the agent runtime, model registry, and AI-assisted task drafting to this workspace.

noAccess.title: You don't have access to this section.
noAccess.body: Contact an org admin to request permissions.

aiTransparency.title: AI Transparency
aiTransparency.subtitle: Mandatory disclosures for every AI feature in this workspace. Required by <link>EU AI Act Article 50</link> (in force 2026-08-02).

oversight.title: Human-oversight posture
oversight.description: Controls whether AI outputs can be applied automatically or must always be reviewed by a human before being applied to workspace data.
oversight.reviewRequiredDescription: Every AI suggestion is queued for explicit human approval before any workspace data is mutated. Triage suggestions are previewed, never applied.
oversight.autoApplyDescription: Features that support it may apply high-confidence AI outputs without explicit human review. Audit log still records every action.

features.heading: AI features in this workspace
features.footer: {userFacing} of {total} features are user-facing and must carry the Generated with AI badge per Article 50.

import.title: Import issues
import.subtitle: Bring work into TaskNebula from a CSV file, Linear, Jira, or GitHub Issues. CSV is fully supported today; the other sources are in preview and may not import every field.

intakeForms.title: Intake forms
intakeForms.subtitle: Public web forms that turn submissions into issues in a project.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect TaskNebula to the tools your team uses every day.

auditStreaming.title: Audit log streaming
auditStreaming.subtitle: Forward every audit event to your SIEM. Supports HMAC-signed webhooks, Splunk HEC, Datadog Logs, and S3 (JSONL).

sso.title: Single Sign-On & SCIM
sso.subtitle: Configure SAML 2.0 with your identity provider and issue SCIM 2.0 provisioning tokens for automated user lifecycle management.

header.subtitle: System-wide organizations, users, rollout flags, agent control, and audit activity.

messages.Configuration: There is a problem with the server configuration.

resetPassword.invalidBody: Invalid or missing reset link. Please request a new one.

verifyEmail.defaultBody: Open the verification link from your inbox to continue. If you need a fresh link, use the resend button on the previous screen.

invalid.title: This verification link is invalid
invalid.body: The token we received doesn’t match any active verification request. Ask for a fresh email from the verification prompt.

expired.title: This verification link has expired
expired.body: Verification links are valid for 24 hours. Request a new one to continue.

already_used.title: This link was already used
already_used.body: You can sign in now. If you still need to verify a different email, request a fresh link from your account.

user_missing.title: Account not found
user_missing.body: We couldn’t find the account this link belongs to. Please sign up again.

server_error.title: Something went wrong
server_error.body: An unexpected error occurred while verifying your email. Please try again in a moment.

verifyRequest.title: Check your email
verifyRequest.bodyWithEmail: We sent a verification email to {email}. Click the link to confirm your email address and continue. The link expires in 24 hours.
verifyRequest.body: We sent you a verification link. Click it to confirm your email address and continue. The link expires in 24 hours.
verifyRequest.didntGet: Didn't get the email? Check your spam folder or resend.

error.title: Something went wrong

boundary.title: Something went wrong

searchCommand.paletteDescription: Search across issues, docs, people, and ask the TaskNebula AI.
searchCommand.searchPlaceholder: Search or jump to… try status:in_progress
searchCommand.noResultsHint: Try removing a filter, or press 5 to ask AI.
searchCommand.jqlPlaceholder: e.g. assignee = me AND status = 'In Progress'
searchCommand.jqlExamples: Examples: assignee = me, status IN ("To Do", "In Progress"), priority = high
searchCommand.confirmDeleteFilter: Are you sure you want to delete this filter?

personalHelp.keyboardShortcutsDescription: Move faster across taskNebula with these shortcuts.

automation.title: Automation rules
automation.subtitle: Automate repetitive work with project-specific or organization-wide rules.
automation.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this automation rule?

form.description: Define a trigger and the primary action the rule should perform.
form.nameDescription: A short name team members will recognize.
form.descriptionHint: Optional — explain when this rule fires.
form.actionDescription: What should happen when the rule fires.
form.enabledDescription: Turn on as soon as saved.

executions.title: Executions
executions.description: Recent runs of this rule, newest first. Click a row to inspect the trigger payload and per-action results.
executions.empty: No executions yet. This rule will run when <trigger></trigger> events happen on this project.

drafts.emptyFiltered: Nothing matches your current filter or search. Try clearing them to see your other drafts.
drafts.emptyDescription: Stash unfinished work items, pages, and comments here. They sync across your devices until you promote them.

chat.noMessages: No messages yet — post the first update.
chat.disabledDescription: Enable communications in workspace or project settings to use channels, issue discussions, and voice rooms.
chat.selectConversationHint: Choose a channel or open an issue or doc discussion to start collaborating.
chat.composerHint: Paste screenshots directly. Ctrl/Cmd + Enter sends.
chat.composerPlaceholder: Write a message, use @name, or paste an image.

send.noPermission: You do not have permission to send messages here.
send.attachmentsDisabled: Attachments are disabled in this project.
send.cannotSend: You cannot send messages right now.

createChannel.title: Create channel
createChannel.description: Add a focused room for a release stream, team function, or incident lane.

moderation.messagesUpdated: {count, plural, one {# message updated.} other {# messages updated.}}
moderation.actionFailedDescription: Failed to update conversation moderation state
moderation.clearDeletedDescription: Permanently remove deleted tombstones from this conversation for everyone.
moderation.clearHistoryDescription: Permanently remove the room history for everyone. Active calls stay untouched.

sidebar.subtitle: Channels and linked discussions
sidebar.recentEmpty: Issue and doc threads appear here.

voice.callLiveDescription: This room is active in the global sidebar dock
voice.activeCallDescription: Someone in this room already started a call
voice.prepareTimeout: Preparing the voice room took too long. Try again.
voice.prepareFailed: Failed to prepare the voice room
voice.connectFailed: Failed to connect to voice room.
voice.activeRoomConnectFailed: Failed to connect to the active voice room.
voice.joinSetupSubtitle: Pick a mic once before connecting. This keeps self-hosted calls more stable.
voice.noMicsVisible: No microphones are currently visible to the browser.
voice.refreshAfterSettings: If you changed permissions in browser settings, use Refresh devices after returning to this tab.
voice.exactSelectionReliable: Exact microphone selection becomes reliable after the browser grants microphone access.
voice.labelsNotExposed: The browser still has not exposed microphone labels; refreshing after returning from browser settings usually fixes that.
voice.exactSwitchingReliable: Exact device switching becomes reliable after browser microphone access is granted.
voice.preparingRoom: Preparing room token and call state…
voice.roomGettingReady: The room is still getting ready. Wait a moment, then join.
voice.joinHintGranted: Browser access is already allowed, so TaskNebula will try to keep your selected microphone through the join flow.
voice.joinHintNotGranted: Before browser access is granted, Chromium and Safari may fall back to the system default microphone or the device chosen in the browser prompt.
voice.joinHintFirefox: Firefox can usually keep the selected microphone all the way through the join flow.
voice.selfMonitorBlocked: Self-monitor playback was blocked by the browser. Try the toggle again if needed.
voice.audioContextUnavailable: AudioContext is unavailable in this browser.
voice.audioContextFailed: AudioContext could not start with the current audio device.
voice.browserStabilityFallback: Chromium and Safari now start with the system default microphone first for a faster, more reliable join. You can switch inputs after the room connects.
voice.switchedToDefault: The selected microphone could not start, so TaskNebula switched to your system default microphone.
voice.micSwitchedToDefault: The selected microphone could not start in this browser, so TaskNebula switched to your system default microphone.
voice.joinedMutedFallback: {error} Joined muted so the call can start right away. You can turn the mic on once you're inside.
voice.enableAudioHint: enable audio once if playback is blocked
voice.speakerStartFailed: Speaker output could not start on this device.
voice.waitToConnect: Wait for the call to finish connecting before changing your microphone state.
voice.leaveFailed: Failed to leave the call cleanly.
voice.endFailed: Failed to end the call cleanly.
voice.audioCaptureUnavailable: Audio capture is unavailable. Check browser permissions and try again.
voice.speakerActivates: Speaker output activates when others are talking. Use the join setup panel if you want to test or self-monitor this device before reconnecting.
voice.noOneElse: No one else is in the room yet. Re-open join setup if you want to re-test this microphone locally.
voice.liveMicEnabled: The live microphone is currently enabled.
voice.liveMicMuted: The live microphone is currently muted.
voice.permissionDeniedRetry: Microphone permission was denied. Allow microphone access in your browser and try again.
voice.micCouldNotStartBusy: Your microphone could not be started. Another app may be using it.
voice.audioEngineFailed: The browser audio engine failed for this device. Stop other audio apps or change your microphone, then try again.
voice.noMicForSession: No microphone was found for this browser session.

runtimeError.serverUnreachable: Voice server is unreachable on the media ports (UDP 50000-50020 / 3478, TCP 7881). Check firewall / NAT and try again.
runtimeError.permissionDenied: Microphone permission was denied. Allow microphone access in your browser and try again.
runtimeError.micNotStarted: Your microphone could not be started. Another app may be using it.
runtimeError.audioEngineFailed: The browser audio engine failed for this device. Stop other audio apps or change your microphone, then try again.
runtimeError.micNotFound: No microphone was found for this browser session.

userSecurity.projectAssignmentHint: Choose which issue visibility scheme this project should apply by default.
userSecurity.projectUsesExplicit: This project uses an explicit scheme.
userSecurity.projectInheritsDefault: This project inherits the organization default.
userSecurity.schemesHint: Control who can see sensitive issues and what defaults new work starts with.
userSecurity.createSchemeDescription: Create a new issue security scheme with a few starter levels.
userSecurity.schemeDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe how teams should use this scheme.
userSecurity.noLevelsYet: No levels yet. Add the first visibility level for this scheme.
userSecurity.editSchemeDescription: Update the scheme metadata and default visibility behavior.
userSecurity.levelDialogDescription: Define who can see issues tagged with this visibility level.
userSecurity.levelDescriptionPlaceholder: Who should be able to view issues in this level?
userSecurity.toastLoadFailedDescription: Issue security schemes could not be loaded.
userSecurity.toastSchemeCreatedDescription: Default visibility levels were added automatically.
userSecurity.toastSchemeUpdatedDescription: Issue security scheme changes were saved.
userSecurity.toastProjectSchemeDefaultDescription: This project now follows the organization default security scheme.
userSecurity.confirmDeleteScheme: Delete this security scheme? Projects using it must be moved first.
userSecurity.toastLevelSavedDescription: Security level changes were saved successfully.

aiModelCards.title: AI Model Cards
aiModelCards.intro: TaskNebula deploys the following AI features to end users. For each, we publish the intended purpose, model identity, data sent on every call, retention policy, and our default human-oversight posture. This page is a public transparency record and applies to all TaskNebula deployments. Disclosure version <version></version>.
aiModelCards.footerContact: Questions about AI transparency, data subject rights, or these model cards? Email <link></link>.

presence.group_viewing: {count, plural, one {# person viewing} other {# people viewing}}
